The revised estimates for the financial year 2025-26 are as follows:
For account headings / goals in statement No. 1, as shown in statement No. 4.
A total amount of Rs.9.00 crores (Rs.9.00 crores only) was consolidated by the Commissioner through this Government Decision.
Child Development Services Schemes are being approved for disbursement and expenditure.
(Rs. in crores)
Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme, Navi Mumbai, Department of Planning and Finance.
Strictly adhere to the guidelines issued from time to time, the prevailing norms, and the Financial Rights Rules.
The funds should be spent as per the prescribed procedure.
